# On 3D Touch Exit

**Menu:** `Events/Object/Touch 3D`

**Nome serializado:** `On3DTouchExit`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Events/Touch3D/On3DTouchExitNode.java`

**Fluxo de entrada superior:** `Nao`

**Fluxo de saida superior:** `Sim`

## Funcao

Evento que dispara quando a condicao `On 3D Touch Exit` acontece.
